name: agent-governance-starter
description: Governance bootstrap generator for agent-native projects.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/init.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-starter.mjs
scripts.smoke:base: rm -rf .tmp/base && node scripts/init.mjs .tmp/base --agent codex && node scripts/doctor.mjs .tmp/base
scripts.smoke:fullstack: rm -rf .tmp/fullstack && node scripts/init.mjs .tmp/fullstack --agent all --profile fullstack-ai && node scripts/doctor.mjs .tmp/fullstack
scripts.fixtures: mkdir -p .tmp && node scripts/doctor.mjs --json examples/template-adoption/base-minimal > .tmp/base-minimal-doctor.json && diff -u examples/template-adoption/base-minimal/expected/doctor.json .tmp/base-minimal-doctor.json && node scripts/doctor.mjs --strict examples/template-adoption/fullstack-ai-saas && node scripts/doctor.mjs --strict examples/template-adoption/macos-beta-handoff
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run validate && npm run smoke:base && npm run smoke:fullstack && npm run fixtures
